description:
Multiple Vocal Harmonies Inspired By The Buddhist Mantra "Om Mani Padme Hum" for Calming The Mind, Deep Transformation, Tranquility and Inner Peace.

00:00  "Om Mani Padme Hum 1" (album MANTRA)
03:30  "OM" ( album MANTRA)

Subscribe to my Youtube channel: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/janewinthervocal/featured

♪  Listen to my music ♪ 
▶︎Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/0PO9NIghm5IGR1uIqCRJ1s
▶︎All platforms: https://orcd.co/janewinthermusic

Connect with me:
▶︎Unisound (web): https://janewinther.com/
▶︎Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/janewinthermusic/
▶︎Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/UnisoundByJaneWinther/
▶︎Tiktok: https://www.tiktok.com/@janewinthermusic



Jane Winther has released 30+ albums and 125+ million streams with focus on acoustic music which touches, heals and creates a space for simply being.
Her music is minimalistic, acoustic and without synthetic instruments and are used daily for meditation, relaxation, mindfulness, yoga practice, sleep and pain relief. 

Jane Winther is developing music that provides not only peace, tranquility, harmony and a sense of unity, but also an atmosphere that allows self-personal and spiritual development.

May Peace, Freedom and Kindness Prevail on Earth
